Chinese weightlifter Lou Shefang won the gold medal in the women's 59kg division at the Paris Olympics on Thursday.

Luo lifted 107kg in the snatch and a clean and jerk of 134kg, achieving a winning total of 241kg.

Maude Charron of Canada took the silver medal with 236kg, and the bronze went to Kuo Hsing-Chun of Chinese Taipei on 235kg.

title: China's weightlifter Luo Shifang wins women's 59kg at Paris 2024 - CGTN
